violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC added more sanitizing solution until quaternary ammonium reached 200 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed to have an accumulation of food residue, and/or other debris: 1) shelving under all prep tables 2) inside hot holding unit 3) fan covers in the walk-in cooler New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
The hand sink in the front prep area was observed in poor repair (faucet leaking). New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The walls in the front prep area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
The ceiling in the front prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
